properties.displayName: High uptime checks and conditional long delays
properties.description: Detect attempts to check system uptime or tick counts and then delay execution for long periods (indicates time-based sandbox evasion logic).
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-Uptime" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "LastBootUpTime" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "GetTickCount" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "GetTickCount64") and (ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds 600" or ScriptBlockText|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds 900")
